TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cadillac_Anderson, title = Cadillac_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cadillac_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Cadillac Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 6, Cadillac Anderson, squliq na p'unro. Cadillac Anderson sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Houston hopa pqwasan biru. 1984 kawas hiya sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Seattle. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cadillac Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 6, Cadillac Anderson, squliq na p'unro. Cadillac Anderson sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Houston hopa pqwasan biru. 1984 kawas hiya sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Seattle. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
